source.name: Financial Stability Board
source.title: 2025 List of Global Systemically Important Banks (G-SIBs)

notes: This file is a seed location dataset for G-SIB banking outlets.
Each bank currently includes one verified head-office outlet as the initial branch record.
The branches array is designed to be expanded later with regional branches, sub-branches, service points, and ATM records.
